quick_skim.title: Spatially Stratified Distillation for Heterogeneous Radar Place Recognition
quick_skim.abstract: Scalable, all-weather place recognition increasingly relies on heterogeneous radar place recognition to bridge diverse hardware platforms. A notable application is matching queries from cost-effective 4D automotive radars against high-fidelity reference maps built by dense spinning radars. This process is fundamentally limited by the extreme sparsity (and narrow field-of-view) of the 4D sensor, which captures only a fraction of the structural density present in the spinning radar database. Prior efforts address this issue by unifying different radar signals. That is, projecting both signals into a common representational space. Yet, they suffer performance degradation in multi-session environments. In this paper, we propose spatially-stratified distillation (SSD); a strategy that replaces standard uniform distillation with an asymmetric spatial alignment derived directly from physical radar returns. In regions where both radars exhibit overlapping returns, SSD enforces strong feature alignment. Crucially, in sparse regions where the 4D student lacks returns but the teacher contains valid structure within the shared field of view, SSD applies heavily discounted distillation weights. Extensive evaluations of the recent HeRCULES dataset demonstrate that SSD significantly outperforms prior place recognition methods, achieving state-of-the-art results on its challenging dynamic sequences.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: heterogeneous radar sensor fusion addressing sparsity
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 异构雷达传感器融合处理稀疏性
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 异构雷达传感器融合处理稀疏性
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 异构雷达传感器融合处理稀疏性
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes spatially-stratified distillation to match sparse 4D automotive radar queries against dense spinning radar maps, improving heterogeneous radar place recognition.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对不同雷达传感器之间的数据稀疏性和视角差异，提出空间分层蒸馏方法，将4D汽车雷达与旋转雷达的特征映射到统一空间，有效提升跨传感器位置识别性能，缓解了多会话环境中的性能下降问题。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对不同雷达传感器之间的数据稀疏性和视角差异，提出空间分层蒸馏方法，将4D汽车雷达与旋转雷达的特征映射到统一空间，有效提升跨传感器位置识别性能，缓解了多会话环境中的性能下降问题。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: methods for fusing multimodal remote sensing data from different sensors
